import pandas as pd
df = pd.read_csv("input_file_0.csv")
df["Total Assets"] = pd.to_numeric(df["Total Assets"].astype(str).str.replace(',', '.'), errors='coerce')
df["Profits After Tax"] = pd.to_numeric(df["Profits After Tax"].astype(str).str.replace(',', '.'), errors='coerce')
res = df[df["Total Assets"] > 1000000].sort_values("Profits After Tax", ascending=False)[["Bank Code", "Profits After Tax"]]
print(res.head())

import pandas as pd
import json
df = pd.read_csv("input_file_0.csv")
df["Total Assets"] = pd.to_numeric(df["Total Assets"].astype(str).str.replace('.', '').str.replace(',', '.'), errors='coerce')
df["Profits After Tax"] = pd.to_numeric(df["Profits After Tax"].astype(str).str.replace('.', '').str.replace(',', '.'), errors='coerce')
df_filtered = df[(df["Total Assets"] > 1000000)]
df_sorted = df_filtered.sort_values("Profits After Tax", ascending=False)[["Bank Code", "Profits After Tax"]].dropna()
print(len(df_sorted))

import pandas as pd
import json

df = pd.read_csv("input_file_0.csv")
df["Total Assets"] = pd.to_numeric(df["Total Assets"].astype(str).str.replace(',', '.'), errors='coerce')
df["Profits After Tax"] = pd.to_numeric(df["Profits After Tax"].astype(str).str.replace(',', '.'), errors='coerce')

filtered = df[df["Total Assets"] > 1000000].copy()
filtered = filtered.dropna(subset=["Profits After Tax"])
sorted_df = filtered.sort_values(by="Profits After Tax", ascending=False)
result = sorted_df[["Bank Code", "Profits After Tax"]]
result["Profits After Tax"] = result["Profits After Tax"].apply(lambda x: round(x, 2) if pd.notnull(x) else x)

lst = result.values.tolist()
print(json.dumps(lst[:5], ensure_ascii=False))

import pandas as pd
import json

df = pd.read_csv("input_file_0.csv")
df["Total Assets"] = pd.to_numeric(df["Total Assets"].astype(str).str.replace(',', '.'), errors='coerce')
df["Profits After Tax"] = pd.to_numeric(df["Profits After Tax"].astype(str).str.replace(',', '.'), errors='coerce')

filtered = df[df["Total Assets"] > 1000000].copy()
filtered = filtered.dropna(subset=["Profits After Tax"])
sorted_df = filtered.sort_values(by="Profits After Tax", ascending=False)
result = sorted_df[["Bank Code", "Profits After Tax"]]
result["Profits After Tax"] = result["Profits After Tax"].apply(lambda x: round(x, 2) if pd.notnull(x) else x)

lst = result.values.tolist()
# Check if any NaN remaining
print(any(pd.isna(x[1]) for x in lst))

parts.text:
```python
import pandas as pd
import json
import warnings
warnings.filterwarnings('ignore')

# Đọc dữ liệu
df = pd.read_csv("input_file_0.csv")

# Chuyển đổi các cột sang dạng số
df["Total Assets"] = pd.to_numeric(df["Total Assets"].astype(str).str.replace(',', '.'), errors='coerce')
df["Profits After Tax"] = pd.to_numeric(df["Profits After Tax"].astype(str).str.replace(',', '.'), errors='coerce')

# Lọc các ngân hàng có tổng tài sản lớn hơn 1.000.000 và loại bỏ các giá trị NaN ở cột Profits After Tax
filtered_df = df[df["Total Assets"] > 1000000].copy()
filtered_df = filtered_df.dropna(subset=["Profits After Tax"])

# Sắp xếp theo lợi nhuận sau thuế giảm dần
sorted_df = filtered_df.sort_values(by="Profits After Tax", ascending=False)

# Chọn cột hiển thị và làm tròn
result = sorted_df[["Bank Code", "Profits After Tax"]].copy()
result["Profits After Tax"] = result["Profits After Tax"].apply(lambda x: round(x, 2))

# In kết quả dưới dạng JSON array
print(json.dumps(result.values.tolist(), ensure_ascii=False))
```
